summary: Iteration 7 testing completed successfully. All newsletter and blog translation features working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed for newsletter subscribe API, admin newsletter endpoint, and admin login. Frontend: Newsletter component renders on homepage with 5-language translations, form submission works with success message, Blog page displays all 8 articles correctly, Blog post pages load with content and related articles, Admin dashboard login works.
passed_tests: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - saves email to DB, returns ok:true
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - handles duplicate emails with 'Already subscribed' message
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - rejects invalid email formats (notanemail, missing@domain, etc.)
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - works with all 5 locales (en, it, es, fr, de)
GET /api/admin/newsletter - returns subscriber list with valid admin token
POST /api/admin/login - returns ok:true and token with correct password
Newsletter component renders on homepage with email input and subscribe button
Newsletter form submission shows success message 'Welcome aboard! Check your inbox.'
Newsletter translations work for all 5 locales (EN: Stay Ahead of the Curve, IT: Resta un Passo Avanti, ES: Mantente a la Vanguardia, FR: Gardez une Longueur d'Avance, DE: Bleiben Sie Voraus)
/blog page loads with 8 articles (1 featured + 7 grid cards)
Blog article titles display correctly in all 5 locales
/blog/project-management-agile-vs-waterfall loads with full content (5 h2, 1 h3, 5 p, 1 ul with 4 li)
Blog post related articles section shows 2 related posts
Admin dashboard /admin/analytics login works with password 4bund4nc142026!
Admin dashboard displays stats, charts, top pages, and event breakdown
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed newsletter subscriptions created during testing (will be in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 fully tested. Newsletter API at /api/newsletter/subscribe saves to 'newsletter' collection in MongoDB. Admin newsletter endpoint at /api/admin/newsletter requires token (SHA256 hash of password). Blog has 8 articles in /frontend/src/lib/blogPosts.js with full translations for EN/IT/ES/FR/DE. Newsletter component uses inline translations object. Admin password: 4bund4nc142026!
